languages.text: {n}Громогласный хохот Ульфара заставлет Батошски присесть от неожиданности.{/n} "Мне нравится этот смертный, эттфатер! Родись он на Фенрисе — его бы прибрал Волчий жрец. Вот была бы потеха — смотреть, как он проходит испытание Моркаи!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Громогласный хохот Ульфара заставлет Батошски присесть от неожиданности.{/n} "Мне нравится этот смертный, эттфатер! Родись он на Фенрисе — его бы прибрал Волчий жрец. Вот была бы потеха — смотреть, как он проходит испытание Моркаи!"
traits.speaker: UlfarCompanion

languages.text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"
languages.original_text: {n}Громогласный хохот Ульфара заставлет Батошски присесть от неожиданности.{/n} "Мне нравится этот смертный, эттфатер! Родись он на Фенрисе — его бы прибрал Волчий жрец. Вот была бы потеха — смотреть, как он проходит испытание Моркаи!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, aett-vater! Had he been born on Fenrys, a Wolf Priest would have claimed him. That would have been a fine jest, watching him endure Morkai's trial!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, aett-vater! Had he been born on Fenrys, a Wolf Priest would have claimed him. That would have been a fine jest, watching him endure Morkai's trial!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

{n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

languages.text: {n}La atronadora risa de Ulfar hace que Batoshski se sobresalte.{/n} «¡Me gusta este mortal, Aett-Vater! Si hubiera nacido en Fenris, un sacerdote lobo lo habría elegido. ¡Me hubiera gustado verlo enfrentarse a la prueba de Morkai!».
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La atronadora risa de Ulfar hace que Batoshski se sobresalte.{/n} «¡Me gusta este mortal, Aett-Vater! Si hubiera nacido en Fenris, un sacerdote lobo lo habría elegido. ¡Me hubiera gustado verlo enfrentarse a la prueba de Morkai!».

languages.text: {n}乌尔法那雷霆般的大笑，让巴托什斯基猛地一惊。{/n}“我欣赏这个凡人，狼领！若他生在芬里斯，一定会被野狼祭司一眼相中。能亲眼看他接受莫凯的试炼，该是多么痛快！”
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

traits.locale_text: {n}乌尔法那雷霆般的大笑，让巴托什斯基猛地一惊。{/n}“我欣赏这个凡人，狼领！若他生在芬里斯，一定会被野狼祭司一眼相中。能亲眼看他接受莫凯的试炼，该是多么痛快！”

languages.text: {n}Le rire tonitruant d'Ulfar fait sursauter Batoshski.{/n} « Ce mortel me plaît, aett-vater ! S'il était né sur Fenris, un prêtre-loup l'aurait choisi. Quelle joie ç'aurait été de le voir passer le test de Morkaï ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le rire tonitruant d'Ulfar fait sursauter Batoshski.{/n} « Ce mortel me plaît, aett-vater ! S'il était né sur Fenris, un prêtre-loup l'aurait choisi. Quelle joie ç'aurait été de le voir passer le test de Morkaï ! »

languages.text: {n}Ulfar'ın gök gürültüsünü andıran kahkahası, Batoshski'yi irkiltiyor.{/n} "Bu ölümlüyü sevdim Aett-Vater! Fenris'te doğmuş olsaydı bir Kurt Rahip onu seçerdi. Morkai Sınavı'na girmesini izlemek büyük bir zevk olurdu!"
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfar'ın gök gürültüsünü andıran kahkahası, Batoshski'yi irkiltiyor.{/n} "Bu ölümlüyü sevdim Aett-Vater! Fenris'te doğmuş olsaydı bir Kurt Rahip onu seçerdi. Morkai Sınavı'na girmesini izlemek büyük bir zevk olurdu!"

languages.text: {n}Ulfars dröhnendes Lachen lässt Batoshski zusammenzucken.{/n} "Ich mag diesen Sterblichen, Aett-Vater! Wäre er auf Fenris geboren worden, hätte ihn ein Wolfspriester angenommen. Was wäre das für ein Spaß, ihm bei der Prüfung von Morkai zuzusehen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Ulfars dröhnendes Lachen lässt Batoshski zusammenzucken.{/n} "Ich mag diesen Sterblichen, Aett-Vater! Wäre er auf Fenris geboren worden, hätte ihn ein Wolfspriester angenommen. Was wäre das für ein Spaß, ihm bei der Prüfung von Morkai zuzusehen!"

languages.text: {n}ウルファルの轟くような笑い声にバトシスキーが驚いてしまった。{/n}「この凡人には好感が持てるぞ、アエット・ヴァーテル！もし彼がフェンリスに生まれたなら、狼の司祭が彼を選んでいたことだろう。モルクアイの試練を彼が見る喜びは計り知れない！」
languages.original_text: {n}Ulfar's thunderous laugh makes Batoshski start.{/n} "I like this mortal, Aett-Vater! Had he been born on Fenris, a Wolf Priest would have chosen him. What a joy it would be to watch him take the Test of Morkai!"

traits.locale_text: {n}ウルファルの轟くような笑い声にバトシスキーが驚いてしまった。{/n}「この凡人には好感が持てるぞ、アエット・ヴァーテル！もし彼がフェンリスに生まれたなら、狼の司祭が彼を選んでいたことだろう。モルクアイの試練を彼が見る喜びは計り知れない！」
